title: Host Conventions v1
description: Fleet-wide docker-compose primitives. Source of truth for cross-cutting compose config that `fleet-runner render-compose` applies to every container service before rendering its docker-compose.yml.

version.description: Schema version. Bump only on breaking changes; fleet-runner will refuse unknown versions.

container_defaults.description: Applied to every service with kind=container.

mesh_defaults.description: Per-mesh layers applied on top of container_defaults. Key is the mesh slug.

composeOverlay.description: A subset of docker-compose service-level keys that fleet-runner knows how to merge. Anything not in this schema is intentionally unsupported here — declare it per-service via overrides.json instead.

extra_hosts.description: compose `extra_hosts` entries, e.g. `host.docker.internal:host-gateway`. Each entry is `hostname:address` — Docker's reserved magic strings (host-gateway) are allowed.

env.description: Environment variables. String values may reference fleet secrets via `${secret:<name>}` (resolved at render time from go-fleet-secrets) — NOT YET IMPLEMENTED in the v1 renderer; reserved syntax.

networks.description: External networks the container joins. Each must be bootstrapped on the dockerhost (`docker network create <name>`) before `compose up`.
